text:
Care/Mentally Retarded Facility. A facility which primarily provides health-
related care and services above the level of custodial care to mentally retarded individuals but 
does not provide the level of care or treatment available in a hospital or SNF. 
55 = Residential Substance Abuse Treatment Facility. A facility which provides treatment for 
substance (alcohol and drug) abuse to live-in residents who do not require acute medical care.
